subject: Human Resources
title: Illegal Interview Questions
description: A 60-second lesson on Illegal Interview Questions.

hook.text: 'Are you planning to have children?' It's a common question in interviews—and it's illegal in most jurisdictions.

buildup.text: Employment law prohibits questions about age, marital status, religion, disability, pregnancy, and national origin.

discovery.text: The rule is simple: if it's not directly related to the ability to do the job, don't ask it.

twist.text: Many interviewers ask illegal questions accidentally, through casual small talk—not knowing they're crossing lines.

climax.text: One illegal question can trigger a discrimination lawsuit—even if the company hired the person they asked.

punchline.text: If it's not about the job, it's not your question to ask.

quiz.question: What makes an interview question illegal?
options: It asks about protected characteristics unrelated to job performance
It asks about relevant work experience
